description_long: This is a sleek, modern business jet with a streamlined fuselage and a low-wing configuration. The airplane features a pair of swept-back wings with subtle dihedral angles and small winglets at the tips, enhancing aerodynamic efficiency. The tail section is equipped with a T-tail design, where the horizontal stabilizer is mounted atop the vertical fin, providing stability and control. The aircraft has two jet engines mounted at the rear of the fuselage, and the landing gear is in a tricycle arrangement with the main gear under the wings and a nose wheel. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage, with multiple windows for visibility, and the entry door with a deployable stair is visible on the left side. The exterior is primarily white with blue and gray accent stripes, giving it a polished and professional appearance.
description: A modern white business jet with swept low wings, T-tail, rear-mounted twin jet engines, and a tricycle landing gear. Blue and gray accent stripes add to its sleek, professional look.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the entry door with stairs, cockpit windows, swept low wing, and rear-mounted engines.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the T-tail, twin jet engines, and the full wingspan.
description_view_2: Right side view displaying the cockpit, wing, and engine configuration, with landing gear visible.
description_view_3: Front view showing the nose, cockpit windows, wing dihedral, and landing gear arrangement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings, subtle dihedral angle, and small winglets at the tips.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer mounted at the top.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, likely multi-seat.
